# Yoga Prosperity Model

> Yoga Prosperity Model is an India-based yoga business mentoring platform founded by Rajyogi Prabhu Zunja. It helps yoga teachers turn their expertise into focused programs, communicate their value, attract suitable clients, and build sustainable purpose-led careers.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/): Overview of the model, outcomes, programs, mentor, and common questions.
- [About Prabhu Zunja](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/about/): Founder background, credentials, mission, and philosophy.
- [Yoga Prosperity Method](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/yoga-prosperity-method/): Five-stage framework covering niche, program creation, positioning, enrolment, and delivery.
- [Programs](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/programs/): Comparison of the Rajat and Vajra Sangh programs.
- [Success Stories](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/success-stories/): Experiences attributed to Yoga Prosperity Model members.
- [Contact](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/contact/): Enquiry details for the Pune-based team.

## Programs

- [Rajat Sangh](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/programs/rajat-sangh/): Entry-level annual yoga business learning and implementation program.
- [Vajra Sangh](https://yogaprosperitymodel.com/programs/vajra-sangh/): High-touch mentorship and collaborative development program.

## Key facts

- Founder: Rajyogi Prabhu Zunja
- Focus: Yoga business mentoring and professional development for yoga teachers
- Location: Ravet, Pune, Maharashtra, India
- Email: support@yogaprosperitymodel.com
- Phone: +91 74200 87709
- Language and market: English, India
- Payment status: Online payments are not currently active; prospective members should contact the team first.
